title: corylus avellana f. aurea
intro: Corylus avellana f. aurea, also known as the golden hazelnut, is a cultivar of the hazelnut tree that is prized for its golden or yellow foliage. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower cholesterol and improve cardiovascular health due to its high levels of flavonoids and antioxidants. The health benefits of Corylus avellana f. aurea include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for heart health and digestive issues. Corylus avellana f. aurea can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
